note: Item 2 was fully extracted in A1 (37 officers). Items 9-16 and 18 were all extracted with operative burdens. This file confirms no thin families remain.

item10_financing.burden: No direct financing. Loan guarantee: BofA, SOFR+3.10%, 7.42% APR, personal+spousal guarantee, cross-default, OAPA waiver.

item11_training.burden: Candidate Development Program 6mo-2yr. HU required. All travel/living at franchisee expense.

item12_territory.burden: No exclusive territory. No protection. McDonald's may compete anywhere.

item13_trademarks.burden: Marks licensed from Restaurant Brands, LLC. Non-exclusive use. Must follow rules.

item14_patents.burden: No patents. Copyrights unregistered. Trade secrets in O&T Manual.

item15_participation.burden: Full time and best efforts. Personal on-premises supervision.

item16_restrictions.burden: Only authorized products. McD has unlimited right to add/delete/change.
